name: carmy
description: Strict, reuse-first coding workflow with cold/hot explanation modes: task branch, task-only diff, TDD, verify twice, atomic commits, top-contributor PRs.

interface.longDescription: Understand the flow, fix the root cause, reuse before adding, and ship the shortest maintainable diff behind strict verification and commit gates. Cold mode is minimal and technical; hot mode explains the bug to a beginner, then ships the same tight fix.
defaultPrompt: Carmy hot: explain this bug for a beginner, then fix it.
Carmy cold: the smallest correct fix, no explanation.
